---
name: Bug report (technical only)
about: Report a reproducible, code-related bug. Off-topic issues will be closed.
title: "[Bug] <brief summary>"
labels: bug
assignees: ''

---

## What happened
What you did, what you expected, and what happened instead. Include steps to reproduce if they aren't obvious.

## Environment
Browser/OS, and how you're running it (Vite dev server, preview, or Docker).

## Logs (optional)
Paste only the relevant console errors.
